Types

HtmlNodeKind = enum
  htmlAttribute,            ## attribute
  htmlDoctype,              ## doctype
  htmlElement,              ## element
  htmlEndTag,               ## end_tag
  htmlErroneousEndTag,      ## erroneous_end_tag
  htmlFragment,             ## fragment
  htmlQuotedAttributeValue, ## quoted_attribute_value
  htmlScriptElement,        ## script_element
  htmlSelfClosingTag,       ## self_closing_tag
  htmlStartTag,             ## start_tag
  htmlStyleElement,         ## style_element
  htmlQuoteTok,             ## "
  htmlApostropheTok,        ## '
  htmlSlashGreaterThanTok,  ## />
  htmlLessThanTok,          ## <
  htmlLessThanExclamationTok, ## <!
  htmlLessThanSlashTok,     ## </
  htmlEqualTok,             ## =
  htmlGreaterThanTok,       ## >
  htmlAttributeName,        ## attribute_name
  htmlAttributeValue,       ## attribute_value
  htmlComment,              ## comment
  htmlDoctypeTok,           ## doctype
  htmlErroneousEndTagName,  ## erroneous_end_tag_name
  htmlRawText,              ## raw_text
  htmlTagName,              ## tag_name
  htmlText,                 ## text
  htmlSyntaxError            ## Tree-sitter parser syntax error
HtmlExternalTok = enum
  htmlExtern_start_tag_name, ## _start_tag_name
  htmlExtern_script_start_tag_name, ## _script_start_tag_name
  htmlExtern_style_start_tag_name, ## _style_start_tag_name
  htmlExtern_end_tag_name,  ## _end_tag_name
  htmlExternErroneous_end_tag_name, ## erroneous_end_tag_name
  htmlExtern_implicit_end_tag, ## _implicit_end_tag
  htmlExternRaw_text,       ## raw_text
  htmlExternComment          ## comment
HtmlNode = distinct TSNode
HtmlParser = distinct PtsParser

Procs

proc kind(node: HtmlNode): HtmlNodeKind {...}{.noSideEffect, raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect].}
proc tsNodeType(node: HtmlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newHtmlParser(): HtmlParser {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc parseString(parser: HtmlParser; str: string): HtmlNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc parseHtmlString(str: string): HtmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc isNil(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc treeRepr(mainNode: HtmlNode; instr: string; withUnnamed: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

Funcs

func `[]`(node: HtmlNode; idx: int; withUnnamed: bool = false): HtmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func len(node: HtmlNode; withUnnamed: bool = false): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func slice(node: HtmlNode): Slice[int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func nodeString(node: HtmlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isNull(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isNamed(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isMissing(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isExtra(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func hasChanges(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func hasError(node: HtmlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func parent(node: HtmlNode): HtmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func child(node: HtmlNode; a2: int): HtmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func childCount(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func namedChild(node: HtmlNode; a2: int): HtmlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func namedChildCount(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startPoint(node: HtmlNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endPoint(node: HtmlNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startLine(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endLine(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startColumn(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endColumn(node: HtmlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func childByFieldName(self: HtmlNode; fieldName: string; fieldNameLength: int): TSNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

Iterators

iterator items(node: HtmlNode; withUnnamed: bool = false): HtmlNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
